devToolsPage.alert: These tools are only available in development mode. Use them to quickly generate test data for testing the application.

testTeams.title: Test Teams
testTeams.description: Create teams with random player data for testing tournament brackets and matches.

errors.partial: Created {{created}} team(s), but {{failed}} failed. Check console for details.

testPlayers.title: Test Players
testPlayers.description: Create players with ELO ratings for testing shuffle tournaments and player management.
testPlayers.success: Successfully created {{created}} player(s){{updated, number} > 0 ? (', and updated ' + updated) : ''}}!

errors.partial: Created {{created}} player(s), updated {{updated}}, but {{failed}} failed. Check console for details.

testServers.title: Test Servers
testServers.description: Create server configurations for testing match management and RCON commands.

errors.partial: Created {{created}} server(s), but {{failed}} failed. Check console for details.

deleteTestData.title: Delete Test Data
deleteTestData.description: Delete all test data (teams and servers with 'test-' prefix). This action cannot be undone.
deleteTestData.confirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to delete ALL test data?

wipeTable.title: Wipe Specific Tables
wipeTable.description: Delete all data from a specific table. Useful for cleaning up without resetting everything. Tables are organized by category.
wipeTable.confirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to wipe the {{table}} table? This will delete all data in that table.

simulation.title: Simulation State
simulation.description: Clear all matches and historical stats so you can click "Start Tournament" in simulation mode on a clean bracket, while keeping servers, teams, maps, and the current tournament setup.

reset.success: Simulation state reset. Matches and stats cleared; servers, teams, and tournament setup preserved.
